text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the day of the autumn Tenno Sho arrives.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Good luck out there today, Opera O! You too,
Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: You too, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the normally reserved Meisho Doto is in
high spirits for today's momentous race.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Well met, Digital! Welcome to
my coronation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I acknowledge your efforts. You've made
astonishing leaps of progress, and now, here you
are, right on our tails.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But you know as well as I that your skills are still
lacking!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the Centurial Overlord! And over a
medium-distance track of turf, my power is
absolute!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're... absolutely correct.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, she appears on the brink of
admitting defeat. However...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You are indeed the Overlord... I have to
acknowledge our difference in skill if I'm going to
cause an upset.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And now, having acknowledged it, I will find a
way... a means to catch up...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. No amount of thinking will save you. You
have already crossed the Rubicon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! What could possibly happen to
offer you the advantage now?! What scheme can
you produce?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plip, plop...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What... strate—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Psssshhhh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! Is this... rain?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Rain?! Heaven weeps...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sudden bout of rain hits. While not exactly a
storm, it may affect the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As the ground becomes more damp...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This rain... Does it symbolize the crying of my
beloved Umas?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No... These must be tears of joy, celebrating my
triumph.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am the All-Rounder. There's no path that I've
shied away from on my journey to this stage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And in this final moment, the entrance to the
narrow path only I can run has shown its face! The
heavens have finally smiled upon me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho on... soft turf... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After all the roads I've run to get here, poor turf
is like a walk in the park! Plus, I'm quite at home
in the water after all my time spent in the ocean
of Uma simping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With this turn of events, I'm bound to win! Shower
me in your love, o gods!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fshaaaaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It begins to pour. The sky's gone completely dark,
save for a beam of light shining down on Agnes
Digital.
